content.full_text:
October 5, 1990

CERTIFIED MAIL -- RETURN RECEIPT REQUESTED

Ms. Blanca Breeze
Attorney, Legal Division
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 "J" Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

RE: No-limit Contributions

Dear Ms. Breeze:

On October 3rd, 4:40 p.m., Mr. Frank Maul and myself talked to you about contribution limits for our committee, The American Ballot Committee, ID No. 842108. In the past, this committee has made contributions to candidates. What we intend to do now is contribute to support a local initiative on the November ballot.

You informed us that our committee may contribute any amount on the initiative: there are no limits on such contributions.

You then suggested that we write to you for your written confirmation of our conversation.

Thank you for your courtesy in this matter.

Yours truly,

JEFF REICH
